description:
Wire latency between desktop and iOS — per-event_type send latency and iOS receive latency with clock-skew correction.

**Freshness caveat:** iOS diagnostic logs are pulled periodically (~30 s per the commit-10 pull interval). Data on the iOS-receive panels may be up to ~30 s stale relative to actual receipt time. The desktop-send panels are real-time (logs land in desktop.jsonl immediately).

options.content:
## Ion Wire Latency

Per-event_type send and receive latency between the desktop and iOS companion. **Desktop-send panels** show real-time data from `desktop.jsonl`. **iOS-receive panels** are bounded by the ~30 s diagnostic-log pull interval (see commit 10) — data may be up to 30 s stale.

Clock-skew correction is applied to iOS receive latency via a heartbeat-seeded exponential moving average (`adj_latency_ms = raw_latency_ms − skew_est_ms`).

panels.title: Desktop → iOS: send queue dwell by event_type (p50 / p95)
panels.description: Time from event entering the send queue to frame build, per event_type. High dwell indicates a blocked send queue (transport backpressure or slow encryption). Source: desktop.jsonl tag=transport-frame fields.queue_dwell_ms.

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.5, {component="desktop"} | json | tag="transport-frame" | fields_queue_dwell_ms != "" | unwrap fields_queue_dwell_ms [1m]) by (fields_event_type)
quantile_over_time(0.95, {component="desktop"} | json | tag="transport-frame" | fields_queue_dwell_ms != "" | unwrap fields_queue_dwell_ms [1m]) by (fields_event_type)

panels.title: Desktop → iOS: payload bytes by event_type (p50 / p95)
panels.description: Compressed payload size per outbound frame. Large payloads (snapshot, conversation_history) drive bandwidth usage. Source: desktop.jsonl tag=transport-frame fields.payload_bytes.

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.5, {component="desktop"} | json | tag="transport-frame" | fields_payload_bytes != "" | unwrap fields_payload_bytes [1m]) by (fields_event_type)
quantile_over_time(0.95, {component="desktop"} | json | tag="transport-frame" | fields_payload_bytes != "" | unwrap fields_payload_bytes [1m]) by (fields_event_type)

panels.title: iOS receive: adjusted latency by event_type (p50 / p95)
panels.description: Clock-skew-corrected one-way latency from desktop frame-build to iOS decode, per event_type. adj_latency_ms = raw_latency_ms − skew_est_ms. Source: ios-diagnostic-logs.jsonl tag=transport.receive msg="frame received", bounded by ~30 s pull interval (freshness caveat).

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.5, {component="ios"} | json | tag="transport.receive" | fields_adj_latency_ms != "" | unwrap fields_adj_latency_ms [5m]) by (fields_event_type)
quantile_over_time(0.95, {component="ios"} | json | tag="transport.receive" | fields_adj_latency_ms != "" | unwrap fields_adj_latency_ms [5m]) by (fields_event_type)

panels.title: iOS receive: heartbeat clock-skew estimate over time
panels.description: The rolling clock-skew estimate (α=0.25 EMA) from heartbeat round-trips. A stable non-zero value is expected and normal — iOS and desktop clocks rarely agree perfectly. Rapid drift may indicate NTP problems on either device. Source: ios-diagnostic-logs.jsonl tag=transport.receive msg="heartbeat received".

targets.expr: avg_over_time({component="ios"} | json | tag="transport.receive" | msg="heartbeat received" | fields_skew_est_ms != "" | unwrap fields_skew_est_ms [5m])

panels.title: DECODE-ERR drop rate (frames/min)
panels.description: Number of incoming frames that failed JSON decode or schema validation per minute. A non-zero rate indicates a wire mismatch (possible version skew between desktop and iOS builds). Source: desktop.jsonl and ios-diagnostic-logs.jsonl. The desktop emits decode errors at ERROR level with tag=transport; iOS emits them at ERROR level with tag=transport.receive in TransportManager+Receive.swift.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({component="desktop"} | json | level="ERROR" | tag="transport" | msg=~".*(decode|decompress|JSON parse|failed to parse).*" [1m]))
sum(count_over_time({component="ios"} | json | level="ERROR" | tag="transport.receive" | msg=~".*(decode|decompression|JSON|failed to parse).*" [1m]))

title: Ion Wire Latency
